channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran - BBC
item.description:

item.description:
1. Kyiv, Ukraine, Hit in Russian Missile Attack  The New York Times

item.description:

item.title: Shark kills spearfisher in front of friends in Australia: "Terrifying thing to see" - CBS News
item.description:

item.title: White House says Iran deal could take days - Axios

item.title: To Get the Strait Open, Trump Had to Leave the Hardest Issues for Later - The New York Times
item.description:
1. To Get the Strait Open, Trump Had to Leave the Hardest Issues for Later  The New York Times
  2. Why Trump Lost to Iran  The Atlantic
  3. The more generous U.S. ceasefire terms are, the more suspicious Iran becomes about another attack  Fortune
  4. Has the U.S. lost the war in Iran?  NPR
  5. An ever-expanding catastrophe over Iran is not inevitable. Trump can and must be stopped | Simon Tisdall  The Guardian

item.title: US and Iran inch closer to peace deal as Trump faces criticism from GOP hawks - The Guardian
item.description:
1. US and Iran inch closer to peace deal as Trump faces criticism from GOP hawks  The Guardian

  3. U.S.-Iran deal up in the air, and California grapples with a toxic chemical tank: Weekend Rundown  NBC News
  4. Trump’s Iran deal up in the air amid GOP blowback  MS NOW
  5. US finalizing deal to end Iran war; international crime trend hits Valley city | Nightly Roundup  FOX 10 Phoenix
